'''tozangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthinic|xanthinic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthinic|xanthinic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tozangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozangithi|tozangithi]] || [[word:tozangiji|tozangiji]] || [[word:tozangishi|tozangishi]] || [[word:tozangiki|tozangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozanguthuthu|tozanguthuthu]] || [[word:tozangujuju|tozangujuju]] || [[word:tozangushushu|tozangushushu]] || [[word:tozangukuku|tozangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozanguthu|tozanguthu]] || [[word:tozanguju|tozanguju]] || [[word:tozangushu|tozangushu]] || [[word:tozanguku|tozanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozangufthuf|tozangufthuf]] || [[word:tozangufjuf|tozangufjuf]] || [[word:tozangufshuf|tozangufshuf]] || [[word:tozangufkuf|tozangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozangethe|tozangethe]] || [[word:tozangeje|tozangeje]] || [[word:tozangeshe|tozangeshe]] || [[word:tozangeke|tozangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozangothotho|tozangothotho]] || [[word:tozangojojo|tozangojojo]] || [[word:tozangoshosho|tozangoshosho]] || [[word:tozangokoko|tozangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozangotho|tozangotho]] || [[word:tozangojo|tozangojo]] || [[word:tozangosho|tozangosho]] || [[word:tozangoko|tozangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozangofthof|tozangofthof]] || [[word:tozangofjof|tozangofjof]] || [[word:tozangofshof|tozangofshof]] || [[word:tozangofkof|tozangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfthĂŻf|tozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfjĂŻf|tozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfshĂŻf|tozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfkĂŻf|tozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|tozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|tozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|tozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|tozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfthĂŻf|tozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfjĂŻf|tozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfshĂŻf|tozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfkĂŻf|tozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfthĂŻf|tozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfjĂŻf|tozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfshĂŻf|tozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tozangĂŻfkĂŻf|tozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tozangĂŠthĂŠ|tozangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tozangĂŠjĂŠ|tozangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tozangĂŠshĂŠ|tozangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tozangĂŠkĂŠ|tozangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tozangathatha|tozangathatha]] || [[word:tozangajaja|tozangajaja]] || [[word:tozangashasha|tozangashasha]] || [[word:tozangakaka|tozangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tozangatha|tozangatha]] || [[word:tozangaja|tozangaja]] || [[word:tozangasha|tozangasha]] || [[word:tozangaka|tozangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tozangafthaf|tozangafthaf]] || [[word:tozangafjaf|tozangafjaf]] || [[word:tozangafshaf|tozangafshaf]] || [[word:tozangafkaf|tozangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tozangasha|tozangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozangshĂ«asha|tozangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozangroasha|tozangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozangmuasha|tozangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozangyaasha|tozangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozangnkshĂ«asha|gotozangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozangnkroasha|gotozangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozangnkmuasha|gotozangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozangnkyaasha|gotozangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tozazangasha|tozazangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozazangshĂ«asha|tozazangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozazangroasha|tozazangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozazangmuasha|tozazangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozazangyaasha|tozazangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozazangnkshĂ«asha|gotozazangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozazangnkroasha|gotozazangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozazangnkmuasha|gotozazangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozazangnkyaasha|gotozazangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tezĂŠngasha|tezĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tezĂŠngshĂ«asha|tezĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tezĂŠngroasha|tezĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tezĂŠngmuasha|tezĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tezĂŠngyaasha|tezĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotezĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gotezĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotezĂŠngnkroasha|gotezĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotezĂŠngnkmuasha|gotezĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotezĂŠngnkyaasha|gotezĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tozfangasha|tozfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tozfangshĂ«asha|tozfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tozfangroasha|tozfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tozfangmuasha|tozfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tozfangyaasha|tozfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotozfangnkshĂ«asha|gotozfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotozfangnkroasha|gotozfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotozfangnkmuasha|gotozfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotozfangnkyaasha|gotozfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
